rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO APARTMENT ASSOCIATION, A CALIFORNIA ET AL VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A CALIFORNIA
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 17, 2022 line 10. HEARING ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE is continued to May 27, 2022 for the moving party to provide a courtesy copy of their petition and memorandum of points and authorities in support of petition with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date no later than May 17, 2022. (Opposition and reply received). =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: THE TIDES CENTER, A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT PUBLIC VS. KIEN HOANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 17, 2022 line 8. DEFENDANT KIEN HOANG'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND Hearing Required. The Court is inclined to grant the motion, subject to defendant preparing and presenting no later than 9:00 a.m. on May 17, 2022 a code-compliant proposed answer. No proposed answer was attached to the moving papers. Answer Defendant attempted to file on April 4, 2022 is deficient. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 17, 2022 line 9. DEFENDANT RUMBLE FITNESS LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer.
